description.en: Today's Lulu — same long-tail core but with AI-assisted publishing tools (Lulu Studio, 2023+), Print API for Shopify / Etsy / direct-author storefronts, education + enterprise B2B publishing, and climate-neutral printing.
description.zh: 今天的 Lulu —— 长尾内核没变,但增加了 AI 辅助出版工具(Lulu Studio,2023 年起)、面向 Shopify / Etsy / 作者独立店铺的 Print API、教育与企业 B2B 出版,以及碳中和印刷。
